'''chahono''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:headbinding|headbinding]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-h-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headbinding|headbinding]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chahono
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæheneth|chæheneth]] || [[word:chæhenej|chæhenej]] || [[word:chæhenesh|chæhenesh]] || [[word:chæhene|chæhene]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chahohonoth|chahohonoth]] || [[word:chahohonoj|chahohonoj]] || [[word:chahohonosh|chahohonosh]] || [[word:chahohono|chahohono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chahonoth|chahonoth]] || [[word:chahonoj|chahonoj]] || [[word:chahonosh|chahonosh]] || [[word:chahono|chahono]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chahofnoth|chahofnoth]] || [[word:chahofnoj|chahofnoj]] || [[word:chahofnosh|chahofnosh]] || [[word:chahofnof|chahofnof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chahonotho|chahonotho]] || [[word:chahonojo|chahonojo]] || [[word:chahonosho|chahonosho]] || [[word:chahonoko|chahonoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chahonoth|chahonoth]] || [[word:chahonoj|chahonoj]] || [[word:chahonosh|chahonosh]] || [[word:chahono|chahono]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chahonothol|chahonothol]] || [[word:chahonojol|chahonojol]] || [[word:chahonoshol|chahonoshol]] || [[word:chahonokol|chahonokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chahonothotho|chahonothotho]] || [[word:chahonojojo|chahonojojo]] || [[word:chahonoshosho|chahonoshosho]] || [[word:chahonoko|chahonoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chahonothon|chahonothon]] || [[word:chahonojon|chahonojon]] || [[word:chahonoshon|chahonoshon]] || [[word:chahonokon|chahonokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chahonothoro|chahonothoro]] || [[word:chahonojoro|chahonojoro]] || [[word:chahonoshoro|chahonoshoro]] || [[word:chahonokoro|chahonokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
